text: The hush and emptiness of the hallway evoke a contemplative solitude in me. I am greeted by cool artificial light and stark lines, sensing abandonment or transition. Moving forward into the next room, I encounter a creative space that celebrates research and innovation—its vibrant wall and glowing screens offer a sharp contrast to the previous austerity. Here, I am struck by the interplay of technology and human curiosity, and I feel quietly inspired, as if I am brushing up against the edges of future possibilities.
